General.Name: TAP REAL ESTATE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
General.Description: TAP Real Estate Technologies, Inc. engages in real estate acquisition, management, and digital infrastructure designed to support the registration, issuance, and trading of real world assets including real estate, precious metals, collectibles, and other tangible assets. The company was formerly known as HUMBL, Inc. and changed its name to TAP Real Estate Technologies, Inc. in March 2026. TAP Real Estate Technologies, Inc. is headquartered in San Diego, California.
General.Address: 101 West Broadway, San Diego, CA, United States, 92101
